info.title: Shippo Shipping API
info.description: REST API for creating shipping labels, tracking packages, managing addresses, parcels, shipments, customs declarations, carrier accounts, and more.

get.description: Retrieve a specific address by its object ID.
Retrieve a specific parcel by its object ID.

post.description: Create a new shipment object. This will automatically generate rates.

get.description: Retrieve a specific shipment by its object ID.
Retrieve all rates for a specific shipment.
Retrieve a specific rate by its object ID.

post.description: Create a shipping label transaction from a rate or with instant label creation.

get.description: Retrieve a specific transaction by its object ID.

post.description: Create a new customs item object.
Initiate a refund request for a shipping label.

transaction.description: Object ID of the transaction (shipping label) to refund.

carrier_account.description: Object ID of the carrier account.

shipment_date.description: Date for which to create the manifest.

get.description: Retrieve tracking information for a shipment.

post.description: Register a webhook to receive tracking updates.
Create a new batch for bulk label creation.
Initiate label purchase for all shipments in the batch.

location.description: Address object ID for pickup location.

ApiKeyAuth.name: ShippoToken
ApiKeyAuth.description: Shippo API token passed as 'ShippoToken <API_TOKEN>' in the Authorization header.

address_from.description: Address object ID or inline address object.

address_to.description: Address object ID or inline address object.

parcels.description: Array of parcel object IDs or inline parcel objects.

rate.description: Rate object ID for label creation.

shipment.description: Inline shipment for instant label creation.

items.description: Array of customs item object IDs.
